widgetData.source_sentence:
NAME: Zucchini, Peppers, and Tomatoes

CATEGORY: Lunch/Snacks

KEYWORDS: Peppers, Vegetable, Low Protein, Low Cholesterol, < 60 Mins, Inexpensive, Lunch/Snacks

TOOLS: pan

INGREDIENTS: zucchini, butter, olive oil, onion, bell pepper, chopped tomato, basil, oregano, feta cheese, parmesan cheese, black olive

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Wash, trim, and slice zucchini.
Salt zucchini lightly and allow to drain for about ten minutes, then pat dry.
Heat the butter and oil, sauté onions until wilted.
Add the zucchini and peppers, cook 2 to 3 minutes.
Stir in tomatoes, herbs, and add salt and pepper to taste.
Cook 4 to 5 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
If the tomatoes are especially juicy, cook briefly over high heat to reduce pan juices.
Remove from heat, stir in optional feta and olives or parmesan, if desired.
sentences:
NAME: Zuvers Barbecue Sauce

CATEGORY: Sauces

KEYWORDS: < 30 Mins, Sauces

TOOLS: sauce pan, separate bowl

INGREDIENTS: molasses, ketchup, apple cider vinegar, worcestershire sauce, liquid smoke, brown sugar, onion powder, chili powder, dry mustard, garlic powder, cornstarch, water

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Mix first 5 ingredients in sauce pan.  Turn burner on low.
Mix next 5 dry ingredients in a separate bowl, and stir into the wet ingredients a little at a time, to make sure everything is smooth.
Once it is all mixed together, turn burner to medium and bring to a simmer, stirring occassionally.  Simmer 15 minutes to meld flavors.
Mix cornstarch and water, stir into sauce and simmer 5 more minutes.

NAME: Honey BBQ Wings Like Kfc's

CATEGORY: < 4 Hours

KEYWORDS: < 4 Hours

TOOLS: cooling rack, small saucepan

INGREDIENTS: purpose flour, salt, black pepper, chicken wing, bbq sauce, honey

INSTRUCTIONS: 
In a shallow dish, combine flour, salt, and pepper.
Coat chicken in flour mixture; refrigerate for 1 hour; coat chicken again with remaining flour mixture.
In a small saucepan, heat BBQ sauce and honey until warm; turn heat to low and keep warm.
Deep-fry chicken, 8-10 pieces at a time, in 375 degree oil for 13 minutes.
Drain chicken on cooling racks.
Immediately toss fried chicken with BBQ sauce mixture.
Repeat with remaining chicken.

NAME: Whipped Carrots

CATEGORY: Vegetable

KEYWORDS: Low Protein, < 60 Mins, Easy, Vegetable

TOOLS: peeler, mixer, mixing bowl, large saucepan, knife

INGREDIENTS: carrot, butter, nutmeg, milk, salt

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Wash the carrots and peel and trim ends.
Cut the carrots in half and place in a large saucepan with enough water to cover them. Add salt and bring to a boil.
Cook until tender.
Drain the carrots and place them in a mixing bowl. Add milk, butter and nutmeg. Beat with an electric beater until smooth.

widgetData.source_sentence:
NAME: Beef and Cabbage Soup  a La  Shoneys

CATEGORY: Low Cholesterol

KEYWORDS: < 60 Mins, Low Cholesterol

TOOLS: knife, pan

INGREDIENTS: ground beef, cabbage, celery rib, bell pepper, onion, kidney bean, tomato, beef bouillon cube, garlic clove, worcestershire sauce, water, pepper

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Dice the vegetables.
Brown the ground beef.
Drain.
Add onion, celery, bell pepper and garlic.
Cook until wilted.
Add the diced cabbage.
Add tomatoes juice and all.
Add Worcestershire sauce.
Add pepper.
Add 2 cups water.
add boullion cubes
Add drained beans.
Cook 30 minutes.
sentences:
NAME: Lemon Cupcakes

CATEGORY: Dessert

KEYWORDS: Lemon, Citrus, Fruit, < 60 Mins, Dessert

TOOLS: oven, wire rack, spatula, mixing bowl, cake pan, eletric mixer, toothpick

INGREDIENTS: butter, butter, lemon, white flour, baking powder, salt, egg, sugar, butter, powdered sugar, lemon juice

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Preheat the oven to 325°F Insert liners into medium cupcake pans.
Prepare cupcakes. Melt butter and lemon zest on low heat; the heat helps release the flavors and spice the butter.
In a bowl, sift flour, baking powder and salt.
Place eggs and sugar in a mixing bowl, beating on medium speed.
Gradually add in the dry ingredients, alternating with the melted butter and mix until mixture is light and airy.
Fill the cupcake liners two-third full.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until cupcakes are springy to the touch and a toothpick inserted in cupcake's center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and cool on wire rack for 10 minutes.
Prepare glaze: in an eletric mixer,beat butter with powdered sugar and lemon juice until frosting is integrated and smooth (add 1 more tablespoon of lemon juice for creamier texture if desired).
Using a spatula, spread frosting on each cupcake, decorating with lemon zest.

NAME: Scones

CATEGORY: Scones

KEYWORDS: Quick Breads, Breads, Healthy, Kid Friendly, Brunch, < 15 Mins, Easy, Scones

TOOLS: bowl, knife, glass

INGREDIENTS: self raising flour, salt, butter, milk, flour

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Sift flour and salt into a bowl.
Melt butter and pour into flour.
Add milk gradually, stirring with a knife, until you have a moist dough.
Turn onto a floured board, knead lightly, then press dough out until it is about 1 inch thick.
Cut with a cookie cutter or glass, and place on a hot floured tray, with each scone touching.
Bake at 220C for 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot with chilled butter, and strawberry jam!

NAME: Asparagus, Bean, and Feta Salad

CATEGORY: Vegetable

KEYWORDS: Low Cholesterol, Healthy, < 30 Mins, Easy, Vegetable

TOOLS: steamer, large bowl, whisk

INGREDIENTS: asparagus, cannellini bean, radish, feta cheese, green onion, lemon juice, mint, olive oil, salt, black pepper

INSTRUCTIONS: 
steam the asparagus, covered, 2 minutes or until crsip-tender. Rinse asparagus with cold water and drain.
Combine asparagus and next 4 ingredients in a large bowl.
Combine the juice and remaining ingredients in a small bowl; stir well with a whisk. Pour over asparagus mixture and toss gently to coat.

widgetData.source_sentence:
NAME: Lemon Broccoli

CATEGORY: Vegetable

KEYWORDS: Low Protein, < 15 Mins, Stove Top, Easy, Vegetable

TOOLS: 

INGREDIENTS: broccoli floret, lemon juice, butter, lemon rind

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Steam florets until they are crisp-tender, about 6 minutes.
Drain well.
Toss with lemon juice, butter, and lemon rind.
sentences:
NAME: Party Pinwheels

CATEGORY: < 30 Mins

KEYWORDS: Easy, < 30 Mins

TOOLS: platter, bowl

INGREDIENTS: cream cheese, dill weed, green onion, bell pepper, celery, flour tortilla, salsa

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Mix first three ingredients together.  Mix well.
Spread on Tortillas.
If using peppers and/or celery sprinkle over tortillas.
Roll up each tortilla tightly.
Wrap in saran wrap.
Chill at least 2 hours.  I recommend overnight.
Before serving, slice into 1 inch slices and put on platter.  Serve with a bowl of salsa or taco sauce.

NAME: Healthy Veggie Scramble

CATEGORY: Breakfast

KEYWORDS: Vegetable, Very Low Carbs, < 15 Mins, Easy, Breakfast

TOOLS: 

INGREDIENTS: egg, spinach, onion, green pepper, mushroom, tomato

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Sautee veggies with non-fat cooking spray, add scrambled eggs, cook until done.

NAME: Baked Banana Oatmeal

CATEGORY: Breakfast

KEYWORDS: Healthy, Kid Friendly, Brunch, < 60 Mins, Easy, From Scratch, Breakfast

TOOLS: oven, knife, prepared pan

INGREDIENTS: rolled oat, oat, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, sugar, egg, banana, skim milk, vanilla, brown sugar

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Preheat oven to 375.
Spray an 8 inch square pan with cooking spray.
Stir together oats, baking powder, salt and cinnamon.
Add sugar, an egg, 1 mashed banana, milk and vanilla. Stir just until combined.
Pour into prepared pan and top with a layer of sliced bananas.
Bake for 25 minutes.
Top with brown sugar and broil until golden. About 3-4 minutes, but watch it carefully!

widgetData.source_sentence:
NAME: Carrots and Mushrooms Saute

CATEGORY: Vegetable

KEYWORDS: European, Low Protein, Low Cholesterol, Hanukkah, < 60 Mins, Stove Top, Easy, Vegetable

TOOLS: large skillet, pot, medium saucepan

INGREDIENTS: carrot, olive oil, garlic clove, mushroom, sugar, dry thyme, salt, black pepper

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Place carrots in a medium saucepan.  Add water to cover by one inch.  Bring to a boil.  Partially cover and boil until tender crisp, about 5-8 minutes.  Drain.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium low heat.  Add garlic and mushrooms and saute, stirring occasionally, until mushroom liquid evaporates, about 6 minutes.
Add carrots, sugar, thyme, salt and pepper, cover and cook over low heat 15 minutes. Uncover, remove garlic; discard. Increase heat to medium-high; cook, stirring often, until carrots and mushrooms are very lightly browned, 2-5 minutes.
sentences:
NAME: Yummy Garlicky Green Beans

CATEGORY: Vegetable

KEYWORDS: Low Protein, Low Cholesterol, < 30 Mins, Easy, Vegetable

TOOLS: skillet, pan, knife block

INGREDIENTS: olive oil, green bean, salt, garlic clove

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Heat the olive oil in a skillet on medium heat. Add green beans making sure that olive oil is distributed evenly, season with salt depending on your taste. Saute for about 10-15 minutes until softened but still crispy. Add minced garlic coating all green beans evenly for about 2-3 minutes, not too long as you don't want the garlic to brown at all--this can leave a bitter flavor. Immediately take off heat, let sit for another 2-3 minute Enjoy!
I love garlic and usually use the 6 cloves, but you can use less to your taste.

NAME: Ramadan Date Bars

CATEGORY: Bar Cookie

KEYWORDS: Dessert, Cookie & Brownie, Fruit, Toddler Friendly, Kid Friendly, Ramadan, < 60 Mins, Easy, Bar Cookie

TOOLS: knife, oven, mixer, pan

INGREDIENTS: butter, brown sugar, egg, vanilla essence, self raising flour, date, walnut

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Preheat oven to 350 F.
Cream the butter and sugar together.
Beat in the egg and vanilla essence.
Fold in the flour, mix well.
add in chopped dates and walnuts.
baked in a greased 9x13 pan for 20 - 25 minutes
cut into bars or squares when cooled.

NAME: Easiest BBQ Chicken Ever

CATEGORY: Chicken

KEYWORDS: Poultry, Meat, Weeknight, Oven, < 4 Hours, Easy, Chicken

TOOLS: glass casserole dish, oven, glass

INGREDIENTS: chicken breast, bbq sauce, brown sugar, butter, chili powder

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Melt butter in glass casserole dish, put in frozen chicken, top with brown sugar, chili powder and pour bbq sauce over; bake at 400 for one hour.

widgetData.source_sentence:
NAME: Lemon-Limeade Concentrate

CATEGORY: Beverages

KEYWORDS: Lemon, Lime, Citrus, Fruit, Canadian, Low Protein, Low Cholesterol, Healthy, Summer, < 15 Mins, Refrigerator, Beginner Cook, Stove Top, Easy, Beverages

TOOLS: pot, fridge

INGREDIENTS: sugar, water, lemon juice, lime juice

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Combine sugar and water.
Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Boil 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Let cool.
Stir in lemon and lime juices.
Put in a jar with a tight fitting lid.
Seal and refrigerate at least 6 hours before using.
This can be kept in the fridge for up to 2 weeks.
sentences:
NAME: Party Punch Ice Ring

CATEGORY: Punch Beverage

KEYWORDS: Beverages, Fruit, Low Protein, Low Cholesterol, Healthy, Free Of..., Potluck, Spring, Summer, Winter, Christmas, Hanukkah, Ramadan, Weeknight, St. Patrick's Day, Freezer, < 4 Hours, Easy, Punch Beverage

TOOLS: punch bowl

INGREDIENTS: ginger ale, lemon juice

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Decoration suggestions:
Apricot halves.
mint leaves.
orange peel.
green grapes.
strawberries.
Mix ginger ale with lemon juice.
Pour 2 1/2 cups of the mixture into a 1 quart ring.
Freeze.
Arrange desired decorations on top of the ice.
Slowly, pour remaining juice mixture over the top so that you don't disturb your decorations.
Freeze -- To unmold, run cold water over the bottom; it will then slip out.
Float in the top of your punch bowl for a very pretty presentation.

NAME: Crock Pot Cream of Spinach Soup

CATEGORY: Spinach

KEYWORDS: Cheese, Greens, Vegetable, Very Low Carbs, Winter, Brunch, < 15 Mins, Beginner Cook, Easy, Inexpensive, Spinach

TOOLS: to crock pot, pan

INGREDIENTS: frozen spinach, cream cheese, milk, chicken broth, onion, cayenne pepper, paprika

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Drain the spinach and add to crock pot.
Dump all the other ingredients into the crock pot.
Cook on low for 6-8 hours.
ENJOY!

NAME: Spiced Mushrooms

CATEGORY: Lunch/Snacks

KEYWORDS: Vegetable, Asian, Indian, Low Protein, Vegan, Spicy, Savory, < 30 Mins, Lunch/Snacks

TOOLS: bowl, wok, glass

INGREDIENTS: button mushroom, ground cardamom, ground black pepper, ground nutmeg, ground cumin, ground coriander, ground turmeric, olive oil

INSTRUCTIONS: 
Place mushrooms into a large ceramic, glass or plastic bowl.
Combine two thirds of oil, cardamom, pepper, nutmeg, cumin, coriander and turmeric in a small jug.
Pour mixture over mushrooms and toss well to coat mushrooms in mixture.
Set aside to marinate for 15 minutes.
Heat a wok over high heat until hot.
Add remaining oil and mushrooms and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until golden and just tender.
Serve hot.
